name: M4 - Postal code should reject non-numeric
description: BUG-003 | Postal code field accepts non-numeric input. Expected: Only numeric characters allowed per acceptance criteria. Actual: 'ABCDEF' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter valid names → enter 'ABCDEF' as post code → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add numeric-only validation for postal code
descriptionHtml: BUG-003 | Postal code field accepts non-numeric input. Expected: Only numeric characters allowed per acceptance criteria. Actual: 'ABCDEF' is accepted without validation error. Steps: Manager → Add Customer → enter valid names → enter 'ABCDEF' as post code → submit. Severity: Normal | Priority: Medium | Fix: Add numeric-only validation for postal code
statusMessage: Known bug — app accepts non-numeric postal codes
